title: Factor Parameters — Transport (v1.0)
description: Parameter sub-schema applied when factor_record.factor_family == 'transport'. Aligned with ISO 14083:2023 and Smart Freight Centre GLEC Framework v3. Frozen v1.0 — 2026-04-22.

payload_basis.description: Activity basis the denominator expresses: tonne-km, vehicle-km, twenty-foot-equivalent-km, or passenger-km.

distance_basis.description: Distance measurement convention. 'route' = actual driven path; 'route_with_empty' = actual driven path including the empty-return leg; 'great_circle' = shortest arc on the geoid (air/sea).

empty_running_assumption.description: Fraction of total distance run empty. Only meaningful when distance_basis == 'route_with_empty'.

utilization_rate.description: Load factor, i.e., average payload / max payload for the leg. 1.0 = fully loaded.

refrigerated.description: True when the factor assumes a reefer / temperature-controlled unit. Non-reefer variants MUST set this to false.

wtw_ttw_label.description: Life-cycle boundary per ISO 14083. 'wtw' = well-to-wheel (full); 'ttw' = tank-to-wheel (operational only); 'ttw_plus_wtt' = the pair published side-by-side on a single record (rare).
